item.title: About
item.description: Hi there! 👋 I’m Raphael Tannous aka rofe33, studying computer science in my second year at university. When I’m not in class, I enjoy exploring new free (as in freedom) and open-source software and learning about open-source tech. I love writing code that’s both simple and safe. Some of them are left dormant on my computer, and the rest are published on github. Feel free to explore my projects. I hope you discover inspiration and something to ignite your motivation, or simply something to captivate your interest.

item.title: CV
item.description: Education Computer Science (Bachelor) 2022 - Present at Islamic University of Lebanon Currently in the second year of the program at IUL. Acquired a comprehensive understanding of core computer science concepts. Developed proficiency in programming languages including HTML, CSS, C++, and SQL. For more information about the university and its program, visit https://iul.edu.lb. Internship Full Stack Developer 2023-09-01 - 2023-09-30 at Premium Golden Data Mastered front-end development skills including HTML, CSS, and Javascript.

item.title: Restaurants Menu
item.description: Welcome to Restaurants Menu, where I specialize in creating personalized websites/menu for restaurants. My service is tailored to meet your unique needs, offering a comprehensive solution to establish a strong online presence…
